ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BY JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2019 - JUDGMENT. - PLAINTIFF SIERRA FUNDING, INC. REPRESENTED BY JARRETT MALONE, EMPLOYEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT QUINCEY MOUTON IS PRESENT. MICHELLE BALESTRIERI TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIERRA FUNDING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOUTON, QUINCEY $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,800.00, PAYABLE IN 14 MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF @200.00 PER MONTH BY THE 16TH OF EACH MONTHS BY CHECK OR MONEY ORDER POSTMARKED BYT THE 16TH OF EACH MONTH. PLAINTIFF WAIVES COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
